case_title: VORONINA LIDIA VS. NATHAN GREGG ROTH, DDS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ROTH, DDS, NATHAN GREGG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROTH, DDS, NATHAN GREGG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-25-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIDIA, VORONINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROTH, DDS, NATHAN GREGG ON MARCH 25, 2015 PLAINTIFF DISCOVERED OR SHOULD HAVE DISCOVERED ANY INJURY RESULTING FROM DEFENDANT'S CARE. PLAINTIFF FILED THIS ACTION ON APRIL 18, 2017. THE ONE YEAR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS PERIOD LAPSED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE EVIDENCE DID NOT SUPPORT THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,400.00 FILED BY LIDIA, VORONINA AS TO DEFENDANT ROTH, DDS, NATHAN GREGG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIDIA, VORONINA AS TO DEFENDANT ROTH, DDS, NATHAN GREGG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VORONINA LIDIA IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY TATYANA LIRSAMAN WITH RUSSIAN TRANSLATION. DEFENDANT NATHAN GREGG ROTH, DDS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.
